utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation (flight details with costs), accommodation (hotel selection with costs), activities (selected activities with costs), additional_services (any extra services with costs), total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Fully specified check: destination is fully specified; travel_dates are not specific dates; transportation lacks flight details; accommodation is okay; activities lack costs; additional_services missing; total_budget lacks breakdown. Thus, only 2/7 items are fully specified.
